message:
Command `# shutil.which returns /nc/apps/bin/ipm (broken wrapper) but subprocess PATH finds /usr/local/bin/ipm first
# Need to ensure /usr/local/bin comes before /nc/apps/bin in PATH for subprocess
export PATH="/usr/local/bin:$PATH"
python3 -c "
import os, shutil, subprocess
print('PATH starts:', os.environ.get('PATH','')[:60])
print('shutil.which:', shutil.which('ipm'))
res = subprocess.run(['ipm', '--version'], capture_output=True, text=True)
print('subprocess ipm:', res.returncode, res.stdout.strip())
"` executed with exit code 0.
